{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Her Highness
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Her Highness]] is a character who modified [[Sola]]'s systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
